mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_patient_managed (user_id, patient_id, relation, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{patientId}, #{relation}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_patient_managed WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND patient_id = #{patientId}
mapper.select: SELECT upm.user_id AS userId, u.username AS username, upm.relation AS relation FROM user_patient_managed upm LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = upm.user_id WHERE upm.patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY upm.create_time ASC
